name: agentproof-arbilink
description: Query AgentProof trust scores for agents registered on Arbitrum One via the ERC-8004 identity registry.
author: AgentProof

endpoints.description: Get trust score and Arbitrum registry status for an agent
Register an agent on the Arbitrum One ERC-8004 registry
Top 10 trusted agents on Arbitrum indexed by AgentProof
Skill status and oracle connectivity check

env.name: PRIVATE_KEY
env.description: Wallet key for signing registry transactions
